paper_title: WizardCoder: Empowering Code Large Language Models with Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Code Evol-Instruct**, a specialized instruction tuning framework that iteratively evolves code instruction complexity through heuristics (constraints, adversarial samples, time/space complexity requirements) and human-generated prompts, significantly enhancing CodeLLMs' ability to handle complex coding tasks. This builds upon Evol-Instruct principles adapted specifically for code domains
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CodeAlpaca dataset + evolved instruction-following dataset (~78k samples)
raw_extraction.application: Advanced code generation, debugging assistance, complex programming task execution, and instruction-following in Python and other languages
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing instruction-following capabilities in Code Large Language Models (CodeLLMs) for improved code generation accuracy and robustness across diverse programming challenges
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling with CodeAlpaca and Code Evol-Instruct evolution
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardCoder: Empowering Code Large Language Models with Evol-Instruct
